{
  "document_metadata": {
    "board": "",
    "subject": "English Language and Literature",
    "class": "IX-X",
    "grade": "9-10",
    "stream": "",
    "academic_year": "2025-26",
    "total_pages": "3"
  },
  "classes": [
    {
      "class_name": "IX",
      "subject": "English Language and Literature",
      "part_or_section": "Syllabus Class – IX (2025-26)"
    }
  ],
  "units": [
    {
      "class_name": "IX",
      "subject": "English Language and Literature",
      "part_or_section": "SYLLABUS CLASS – IX (2025-26)",
      "unit_id": "U1",
      "unit_name": "Section A: Reading Skills",
      "marks": 20,
      "topics": [
        "Reading Comprehension through Unseen Passage"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Discursive passage of 400-450 words (10 marks)",
        "Case-based factual passage with visual input (200-250 words) (10 marks)"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Comprehension",
        "Interpretation",
        "Analysis",
        "Inference",
        "Evaluation",
        "Vocabulary"
      ]
    },
    {
      "class_name": "IX",
      "subject": "English Language and Literature",
      "part_or_section": "SYLLABUS CLASS – IX (2025-26)",
      "unit_id": "U2",
      "unit_name": "Section B: Writing Skills and Grammar",
      "marks": 20,
      "topics": [
        "Grammar",
        "Writing Skills"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Determiners",
        "Tenses",
        "Modals",
        "Subject – verb concord",
        "Reported speech (Commands, requests, Statements, Questions)",
        "Gap Filling/Editing/Transformation exercises",
        "Writing a Descriptive Paragraph (100-120 words)",
        "Writing a Story/Diary Entry (100-120 words)"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Accuracy in spelling, punctuation and grammar",
        "Professional grasp of grammatical items",
        "Descriptive writing",
        "Creative writing"
      ]
    },
    {
      "class_name": "IX",
      "subject": "English Language and Literature",
      "part_or_section": "SYLLABUS CLASS – IX (2025-26)",
      "unit_id": "U3",
      "unit_name": "Section C: Language through Literature",
      "marks": 40,
      "topics": [
        "Reference to the Context",
        "Short & Long Answer Questions"
      ],
      "subtopics": [
        "Extract from Drama / Prose (5+5 marks)",
        "Extract from Poetry (5+5 marks)",
        "Short Answer Type Questions from BEEHIVE (40-50 words)",
        "Short Answer Type Questions from MOMENTS (40-50 words)",
        "Long Answer Type Question from BEEHIVE (100-120 words)"
      ],
      "key_concepts": [
        "Interpretation",
        "Analysis",
        "Inference",
        "Evaluation",
        "Appreciation",
        "Creativity",
        "Imagination",
        "Extrapolation beyond the text"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "chapters": [],
  "competencies": [
    {
      "title": "Oral and Written Communication Proficiency",
      "outcomes": [
        "Build greater confidence and proficiency in oral and written communication",
        "Make appropriate usage of English language both written and oral",
        "Communicate in various social settings and express agreement and disagreement with logic"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Critical Reflection and Inquiry",
      "outcomes": [
        "Develop the ability and knowledge required to engage in independent reflection and inquiry",
        "Equip learners with essential language skills to question and articulate their point of view",
        "Arrive at conclusion through discussion and debate"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Literary Appreciation and Cultural Sensitivity",
      "outcomes": [
        "Develop sensitivity to, and appreciation of world literature representing varieties of English and cultures",
        "Read poems effectively with proper rhythm and intonation and understand literary devices",
        "Develop curiosity and creativity through extensive reading of literature from different time periods"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Information Access and Self-Learning",
      "outcomes": [
        "Enable the learner to access knowledge and information through reference skills",
        "Facilitate self-learning to enable them to become independent learners",
        "Review, organise and edit their own work and work done by peers"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Functional Language Application",
      "outcomes": [
        "Give a brief oral description of events/incidents of topical interest",
        "Retell the contents of authentic audio texts",
        "Participate in conversations and discussions on topics of mutual interest",
        "Respond in writing to business letters, official communications, emails etc.",
        "Write without prior preparation on a given topic (article, speech, or debate)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Multimodal Literacy and Transcoding",
      "outcomes": [
        "Read and identify main points of texts like scripts of audio-video interviews",
        "Write a summary of short lectures by making/taking notes",
        "Transcode information from a graph/chart to a description/report",
        "Write dialogues, short stories or reports based on visual cues"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
